page_metadata.biotools__summary: This web-server was developed to identify the N6-methyladenosine (m6A). It was observed by the rigorous cross-validation test on the benchmark dataset that the accuracy achieved by the predictor in identifying m6A was 65.59%.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This web-server was developed to identify the N6-methyladenosine (m6A). It was observed by the rigorous cross-validation test on the benchmark dataset that the accuracy achieved by the predictor in identifying m6A was 65.59%.
